case_title: STATE OF CA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DPT VS. JENEVA PANINGBATAN

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DPT
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DPT AS TO DEFENDANT PANINGBATAN, JENEVA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT , ORDER ORDER TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY. JUDGMENT OF JAN-07-2002 SET ASIDE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANINGBATAN, JENEVA $1,766.05 PRINCIPAL, $103.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,869.05, TOTAL 1,869.05 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
